about.subtitle: About Us
about.title: Your Trusted Automotive Partner
about.desc: We are the dealership you can trust for integrity and value — serving Sioux Falls since 2014.
about.storyTitle: Driven by Passion, Built on Trust
about.storyP1: Power Drive Motor was founded with a simple mission: to provide an exceptional car buying experience built on transparency, quality, and genuine customer care. Located in the heart of Sioux Falls, South Dakota, we have grown from a small lot into a premier destination for quality pre-owned vehicles.
about.storyP2: Every vehicle in our inventory undergoes a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards. We believe that buying a car should be exciting, not stressful — which is why we've eliminated the pressure tactics and hidden fees commonly found in traditional dealerships.
about.storyP3: Whether you're looking for a reliable daily driver, a family SUV, or a powerful truck, our experienced team is here to help you find the perfect match. We also offer flexible financing options tailored to your budget, comprehensive maintenance services, and concierge-level support.

values.subtitle: Our Values
values.title: What Sets Us Apart
values.desc: We believe in a better way to buy cars — one built on trust, quality, and exceptional service.
values.integrityDesc: Every vehicle we sell comes with a promise of transparency — honest pricing, detailed inspections, and no hidden fees.
values.qualityDesc: We hand-select only quality pre-owned vehicles, ensuring each one meets our rigorous standards of reliability and value.
values.clientDesc: From your first inquiry to long after you drive off, our dedicated team is here to support you every step of the way.

items.salesDesc: Browse our curated collection of quality vehicles from trusted manufacturers. Each vehicle undergoes rigorous inspection.
items.financeDesc: Flexible finance solutions tailored to your needs. We work with premier lenders to secure the best rates for your dream car.
items.maintenanceDesc: Factory-trained technicians using genuine parts and cutting-edge diagnostics to keep your vehicle performing at its peak.
items.detailingDesc: Premium detailing services including ceramic coating, interior detailing, and window tinting.
items.tradeDesc: Get top dollar for your current vehicle. Our experts provide fair, transparent valuations with instant offers.
items.conciergeDesc: From personalized shopping to after-sales support, our concierge team ensures a seamless experience.

financing.subtitle: Financing
financing.title: Flexible Financing Options
financing.desc: Drive your dream car with confidence. We offer competitive rates and personalized payment plans tailored to your financial goals.

plans.competitiveRatesDesc: We leverage our network of premier lenders to secure the best possible rates for qualified buyers.
plans.flexibleTermsDesc: Choose from 24 to 84-month terms with options for balloon payments and seasonal payment plans.
plans.quickApprovalDesc: Our streamlined application process delivers approvals within 24 hours, often same-day.

credit.subtitle: Credit Application
credit.title: Apply For Financing
credit.desc: Complete the form below and our finance team will get back to you within 24 hours with a personalized offer.
credit.submittedDesc: Our finance team will review your application and contact you within 24 hours.
credit.consent: I consent to Power Drive Motor collecting my information to process this credit application and to contact me regarding my request. Message frequency may vary. Message and data rates may apply. Text STOP to opt out at any time.
credit.sidebarRate: Competitive rates starting as low as 3.9% APR
credit.sidebarFees: No hidden fees or prepayment penalties
credit.calculatorDesc: Try our financing calculator to estimate your monthly payments before applying.

footer.desc: Your premier destination for quality pre-owned vehicles. We bring quality pre-owned vehicles to your doorstep.
